title: SwiftUI View Basics
content:
### SwiftUI View Basics

SwiftUI provides a rich set of built-in views and modifiers for building interfaces. Views are composed and configured using a modifier chain pattern.

**Basic Views:**

| View | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `Text` | Display read-only text |
| `TextField` | Editable text input |
| `Image` | Display an image |
| `Button` | Tappable button |
| `Toggle` | On/off switch |
| `Slider` | Value slider |
| `Picker` | Selection control |
| `ProgressView` | Loading indicator |

```swift
struct FormView: View {
    @State private var username = ""
    @State private var isEnabled = false
    @State private var volume = 0.5
    
    var body: some View {
        Form {
            Text("Settings")
                .font(.title)
            
            TextField("Username", text: $username)
            
            Toggle("Enable Notifications", isOn: $isEnabled)
            
            VStack {
                Text("Volume: \(Int(volume * 100))%")
                Slider(value: $volume)
            }
            
            Button("Save") {
                // Save action
            }
            .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
        }
    }
}
```

**Layout Views:**

| View | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| `VStack` | Vertical arrangement |
| `HStack` | Horizontal arrangement |
| `ZStack` | Overlapping layers |
| `List` | Scrollable list |
| `Form` | Grouped form layout |
| `ScrollView` | Scrollable content |
| `Spacer` | Flexible space |
| `Divider` | Separator line |

```swift
HStack {
    Text("Left")
    Spacer()
    Text("Center")
    Spacer()
    Text("Right")
}

ZStack {
    Color.blue
    Text("Overlay")
        .foregroundColor(.white)
        .font(.largeTitle)
}
```

**Common Modifiers:**

| Category | Modifiers |
|----------|-----------|
| Font | `.font()`, `.bold()`, `.italic()` |
| Color | `.foregroundColor()`, `.background()` |
| Padding | `.padding()`, `.padding(.horizontal)` |
| Frame | `.frame()`, `.frame(minWidth:maxWidth:)` |
| Border | `.border()`, `.cornerRadius()` |
| Shadow | `.shadow()` |
| Opacity | `.opacity()` |

> **Key Point:** Modifiers are applied in order. Some modifiers (like `.padding()` and `.frame()`) affect the layout of subsequent modifiers.

Views can be extracted into separate computed properties or custom view types for reusability.

quiz.question: What modifier adds space around a view?
